title: Better Dark Gui
description: Makes UI dark, which is more pleasant to the eyes + Red Theme!
body:
**Better Dark GUI**
> Better Dark GUI is a sleek and stylish texture pack that transforms your Minecraft interface with a dark, red-themed design. It replaces the default GUI with a cooler, more immersive look—perfect for players who prefer a darker aesthetic. Whether you're crafting, managing inventory, or navigating menus, this pack enhances the overall experience with a bold and modern vibe.
> 

![Hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52a463bf68e65272fbe0ac73ec6c2663c39cd752.jpeg)
> **Hud And Escape menu+**


![Escape Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cde224213baebcaa82d0ef992e405825de5a7ce.png)
